itemdesc-bloodchunks-solid: Blood that has been boiled to reduce it to chunks. Needs to be dried for further use.
itemdesc-bloodchunks-dried: Blood chunks that have been air-dried. Need to be ground to turn into bloodmeal.
itemdesc-bloodmeal: Blood that has been dried and ground into a fine powder. It is a fertilizer with moderate amounts of nitrogen.
itemdesc-feathersboiled: Feathers that have been boiled to break down the keratin in them. Needs to be ground for further use.
itemdesc-feathermeal-wet: Boiled feathers that have been ground into a paste. Needs to be dried for further use.
itemdesc-feathermeal-dried: A fine powder made from boiled and ground feathers. It is a fertilizer with moderate amounts of nitrogen.
itemdesc-seaweedmeal-wet: Ground seaweed. Needs to be dried for further use.
itemdesc-seaweedmeal-dried: A fine powder made of ground and dried seaweed. It is a fertilizer with small amounts of potassium and nitrogen.
itemdesc-fishmeal-wet: Whole fish that have been ground into a paste. Needs to be dried for further use.
itemdesc-fishmeal-dried: A fine powder made of ground and dried fish. It is a fertilizer with moderate amounts of nitrogen and phosphorus.
